mapper.select: SELECT acc.nickname AS nick, m.img_src AS mbtiSrc, a.img_src AS aniSrc FROM account_tb acc JOIN mbti_tb m ON acc.mbti = m.mbti JOIN ani_tb a ON acc.ani = a.ani WHERE acc.id = #{id}

SELECT luck_ty, seq, luck FROM ( SELECT luck_ty, seq, luck, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY luck_ty ORDER BY dbms_random.value) AS rn FROM ( SELECT seq, luck, luck_ty FROM luck_text_tb WHERE luck_ty IN (10, 20, 30, 40, 50) ) ) WHERE rn = 1
